title: GTC Paris Keynote at VivaTech 2025
description: NVIDIA Founder & CEO Jensen Huang’s keynote at the Dôme de Paris in the Expo Porte de Versailles on June 11, 2025Watch the NVIDIA GTC Paris Live at VivaTech 2025 PregameWednesday, June 11, at 9:30 a.m. | Dôme de Paris and Streaming LiveThe excitement starts before Jensen Huang takes the stage for the GTC Paris Keynote at VivaTech. Be sure to catch the live broadcast leading up to the keynote, hosted by CJ Muse of Cantor Fitzgerald and Nick Patience of Futurum, featuring special guests and content you won’t see anywhere else.Sign up: https://www.nvidia.com/en-eu/gtc/keynote/?nvid=nv-int-unbr-905700Check out The Rundown AI to join the 1,000,000+ Early Adopters from Companies Like NASA & Apple in The Rundown AI
